name: The War Within Season 2
warnings: Original expansionId was 10, but wow-expansions.json uses 514 for The War Within.
Original raidInstanceIds contained 1278 (Khaz Algar). For The War Within Season 2, the raid instance was corrected to 1296 (Liberation of Undermine).
Original mythicPlusDungeonIds [506, 525] do not exist in wow-instances.json. The corrected file uses journal instance IDs from wow-instances.json.

Operation: Mechagon - Workshop is represented by the full Operation: Mechagon instance in wow-instances.json, so this file keeps the instance id 1178 but filters encounters to the four Workshop bosses.

name: Midnight Season 1

source.correctionReason: The uploaded expansion list contains Midnight as expansionId 516, and current Season 1 references identify Midnight Season 1 as the current season.
source.idSemantics: All instance IDs in this file are journal instance IDs from wow-instances.json. Original mythicPlusDungeonIds [506, 525] were not resolvable in wow-instances.json.

warnings: Regenerated from the uploaded source JSON as Midnight Season 1 instead of The War Within Season 2.
wow-expansions.json uses id 516 for Midnight. It also has id 505 named Current Season, but no uploaded instances reference expansionId 505.
The original wow-seasons.json has expansionId 10, which does not exist in wow-expansions.json.
The original mythicPlusDungeonIds [506, 525] do not exist in wow-instances.json, so they were not carried forward as journal instance IDs.
The uploaded instance named Midnight (id 1312) is typed as raid, but its encounters match world bosses, so it is separated into worldBossInstances instead of raidInstances.
Other Midnight dungeons present in wow-instances.json but not in the Season 1 Mythic+ pool were intentionally excluded from mythicPlusDungeons.
